name: Extract structured data from a DOCX invoice
prompt: Read the file invoice.docx and extract its contents into a structured JSON file called invoice_data.json with these fields: (1) invoice_number: the invoice number string, (2) date: the invoice date in YYYY-MM-DD format, (3) from: the sender company name, (4) to: the recipient company name, (5) line_items: array of objects with item (string), quantity (number), unit_price (number), total (number), (6) subtotal: number, (7) tax_rate: number (as decimal, e.g., 0.08), (8) tax_amount: number, (9) total_due: number, (10) payment_terms: string, (11) due_date: string in YYYY-MM-DD format.

criteria.testPattern: 5 line items|first item|last item|quantities are numbers

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
